label: Seborrheic dermatitis or dandruff without secondary infection
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of seborrheic dermatitis or dandruff.
No secondary bacterial infection, eye involvement, severe diffuse rash, or immunocompromised-host pathway.
exclusion_criteria: Rash near the eye or mucosal involvement.
Severe diffuse rash, skin peeling, systemic illness, or immunocompromised host requiring a separate pathway.
must_not_miss: Psoriasis flare requiring a different pathway.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care or dermatology if symptoms are not improving with the plan you were given.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports seborrheic dermatitis and dandruff framing, common symptoms, medicated-shampoo home care, chronic relapsing course, and escalation for failed self-care or drainage, pus, crusting, marked redness, or pain. Autonomous Phase 1501-1550 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed seborrheic dermatitis or dandruff without secondary infection, eye involvement, mucosal disease, severe diffuse rash, systemic illness, or immunocompromised-host pathway.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of seborrheic dermatitis or dandruff
no eye, mucosal, severe diffuse, systemic, or immunocompromised-host pathway
